race.comment: ZOUTRAIL (11) doesn't win out of turn but is knocking on the door and looks to have found her race this time. Was brave on pace last time under the light weight but was just run down late but a few smarter ones. Sets up nicely back to this level and rates a leading player. THE MAGISTRATE (3) returns and is a noted fresh performer that has jumped out sharply in readiness. Hasn't won for a long time but this is one of his better chances. REINE OF NINE (13) shares a similar profile, not winning often but has the peaks to give this a big shake. The form around her this prep reads strongly and if on song she'll be fighting out the finish. ALOHA BLUE (12) is mixing her form but keeps Holder and is among the each-way chances. Same too NOSTRYIA (4) third-up.
